title: acalypha subsessilis var. glabra
intro: Acalypha subsessilis var. glabra is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the acalypha plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Acalypha subsessilis var. glabra include the treatment of various ailments such as skin conditions, wounds, and fever. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
